text: General Guidelines for the freshers (First year UG students) Dear Students and Parents, Warm greetings and welcome to IIT Jammu! As you prepare to join the Institute, kindly take note of the following important guidelines to ensure a smooth and comfortable reporting process: 1. Accommodation for Parents/Guardians: On-campus accommodation for accompanying parents/guardians will not be provided. Families are requested to make suitable arrangements at hotels/guest houses etc in Jammu. 2. Campus Exit Restrictions Post-Reporting: Once a student has formally reported and completed check-in at the hostel, leaving the campus will not be permitted if not accompanied with parents until the student ID card is issued, which may take some time. This is to ensure safety and administrative compliance. 3. Special Provision for Accompanied Students: Students arriving with their parents may be permitted to stay overnight on 27th July 2025 only at their respective accommodation outside the campus. This p

metadata.url: https://iitjammu.ac.in/Programme/ugadmissions/2025/documents/General Guidelines for the freshers_First year UG students.pdf
metadata.title: Ugadm Programme Ugadmissions 2025 Documents General Guidelines For The Freshers First Year Ug Students.Pdf

text: as mattresses, pillows, buckets, and other daily-use items. However, students are free to bring these items with them or purchase them from outside, as per their convenience. 6. Mobile Connectivity: Kindly note that prepaid mobile SIM cards from outside J&K do not work in Jammu. Students are advised to either carry a postpaid SIM card or plan to purchase a new SIM locally upon arrival. 7. Use of Electrical Devices: Only essential devices such as mobile phones & laptops are permitted in the hostels. Other electrical appliances are not allowed for safety reasons. 8. Tuck Shop Facility: A Tuck Shop is available on campus which provides most basic items and daily necessities, ensuring students have easy access to essential supplies. 9. Parents are kindly requested to leave the campus premises by 6:00 PM. Please note that to ensure smooth functioning of the dining facilities and to avoid overcrowding, parents will not be permitted to have Dinner in the student messes.

text: IIT Jammu see to it that these requirements are met promptly and in the best way possible. We would like you to extend your assistance for the same by simply making sure that you know a few things about this institute, to get a general idea of how things function here. This letter is written with the purpose of helping you understand the same. At this institute, we have a system of providing Advisors to all the students. The advisors help the first year students make a smooth transition from life at home to life at this institute. It is advised that you to meet the advisor whenever you visit the campus. It would be beneficial if you could also stay in touch with advisors during the course of the semester. Academic Structure A typical academic year at IIT Jammu is divided into two semesters – Autumn Semester and Spring Semester The curriculum at IIT Jammu is based on the credit system. Each course is allotted credits based on the number of lectures, tutorials and lab hours per week. The

metadata.title: Ugadm Programme Ugadmissions 2025 Documents Invitation Letter Preparatory Students Ug 2025 Final.Pdf

text: Hospital/doctors or other supporting documents in such cases. Preparatory course is a pre-degree course and admission to the actual degree program is conditional upon successful completion of the Preparatory course. The duration of preparatory course is of one year (2 semesters). Only after successful completion of Preparatory Courses, students can pursue the program they are admitted for at the earmarked IIT. Also, the stream for your regular B.Tech. Degree programme will be the same as it is decided by JOSAA (in the year of admission to Preparatory course). Hostel Life At this institute, we believe in the overall development of our students. General lifestyle of students includes a lot of extracurricular activities in fields of sports, cultural and technical activities, at intra- hostel, inter-hostel and inter- college events. The environment here is very conducive to growth and our institute has some of the best facilities in India. So, we encourage students to take up whatever inte

text: strictly banned in the campus and we are extremely vigilant and strict in this matter. In case of any issue which is quite unlikely, the student should report to his/her mentor immediately. We assure you that it will be dealt with confidentiality and with the highest priority. Interaction of the freshmen with seniors (other than the appointed mentors if any) is restricted during their first month as a preventive measure. It is expected that the freshmen develop a healthy rapport with seniors as they themselves are amongst the brightest in the country and excel at various activities. In fact, a healthy senior- junior interaction is the hallmark of an IIT system and we would like to maintain that. Our purpose of sharing the above information with you is to assure that as parents, you need not be unduly alarmed. Website: www.iitjammu.ac.in Phone: 0191-2570633 Email: ugoffice.acad@iitjammu.ac.in Letter to Parents from IIT Jammu Dear Parent/Guardian, Greetings from IIT Jammu. It gives us immense pleasure to congratulate you and your ward for your exemplary success. The IIT Jammu would like to welcome you and your ward to one of the most prestigious institutes in our country, the Indian Institute of Technology Jammu. We believe that, as well-informed parents, you should be familiarized with both the academic and the extra- curricular life style of students at this institute and get an idea about the various opportunities that your ward will have, as well as the underlying responsibilities. The faculty at this institute strives hard to make sure that the academic needs of each of their students are taken care of and also to make his/her stay here fru

metadata.title: Ugadm Programme Ugadmissions 2025 Documents Invitation Letter Students 2025 Ug Final.Pdf

text: Structure A typical academic year at IIT Jammu is divided into two semesters – Autumn Semester and Spring Semester The curriculum at IIT Jammu is based on the credit system. Each course is allotted credits based on the number of lectures, tutorials and lab hours per week. There is continuous evaluation by means of quizzes, assignments, mid-semester, end-semester examinations and lab work throughout the semester. At the end of each semester, the student gets an SGPA which is an average of the grades in each of the courses he/she had registered for in that semester, weighted with the credits of those courses respectively. CGPA is a weighted average of all the SGPAs (till date) weighted on the number of total credits each semester. The importance of maintaining a steady attendance in classes here cannot be understated. It is advised that students do not miss classes. The students are expected to attend all the classes and the institute has a policy that the students attend at least 70% of

metadata.title: Ugadm Programme Ugadmissions 2025 Documents Invitation Letter Students 2025 Ug Final.Pdf

text: our students. General lifestyle of students includes a lot of extracurricular activities in fields of sports, cultural and technical activities, at intra- hostel, inter-hostel and inter- college events. The environment here is very conducive to growth and our institute has some of the best facilities in India. So, we encourage students to take up whatever interests them, and we request you to support them in their choices. There is enough time in a normal IIT student’s day to fit in both academics and extracurricular activities without much stress. But, at the same time, it is advised that care must be taken to ensure proper time management such that academics are not neglected because of such activities. Hostels form an integral part of every IIT students’ life. The hostels are well equipped with necessary infrastructure and mess facilities. The transition of your ward, from your loving and caring hands to a completely new and competitive environment of IIT, could occasionally cause a

metadata.title: Ugadm Programme Ugadmissions 2025 Documents Invitation Letter Students 2025 Ug Final.Pdf

text: unlikely, the student should report to his/her mentor immediately. We assure you that it will be dealt with confidentiality and with the highest priority. Interaction of the freshmen with seniors (other than the appointed mentors if any) is restricted during their first month as a preventive measure. It is expected that the freshmen develop a healthy rapport with seniors as they themselves are amongst the brightest in the country and excel at various activities. In fact, a healthy senior- junior interaction is the hallmark of an IIT system and we would like to maintain that. Our purpose of sharing the above information with you is to assure that as parents, you need not be unduly alarmed. We hope that the above information on academics, hostel life and other facilities and services provided by us will give you a fair idea about the life of your ward over the next few years. This institute offers a wide range of opportunities for well-rounded development of the students and we hope that

text: General information regarding scholarships available to the B. Tech.batch students during each Semester of the academic year - reg. This relates to the criteria and procedure for disbursement of scholarships to the B. Tech. students of each year during each Semester (Autumn Semester & Spring Semester) of the Academic year. In accordance with the Gazette of India notification dated 31 July 2017 (First Statutes of Indian Institute of Technology Jammu), section 25 of the notification empowers the Director (in consultation with Senate) to decide the eligibility & guidelines for administering the assistance to Meritorious students. Therefore, it has been decided to invite applications from students of each year during each Semester of any academic year (i.e. for Autumn Semester in the month of July and for Spring Semester in the month of January) for providing scholarships under following three categories: Sl. No. Name of Scholarship Eligible category Benefits Merit-cum-Means (MCM) to max.

text: Caste certificate (if applicable). The brief terms and conditions for availing various scholarships are also provided as: 1. Merit-cum-Means (MCM):The number of MCM scholarships for each year and in each branch will be limited to max 25% of the specific category students' strength in that particular branch in that year. (General, EWS & OBC students admitted from respective categories), wherein the tuition fee paid by these students shall be waived off and additionally scholarship of Rs.1,000/- for each month (only those months will be counted in which classes are being conducted) is also released upfront for each Semester. The other eligibility conditions shall be: (a) The MCM scholarship shall be available to General, OBC-NCL and EWS Category students only. (b) For the new admissions in every year (Autumn Semester), the JEE Advance Rank of the student shall be considered for determining the merit and award of scholarship. (c) For the existing students (Spring Semester & Autumn Semeste

text: competent authority approves his request, he can avail scholarship from the other source. 2. Free Messing: All the SC and ST students are exempted from payment of tuition fee during each Semester. The facility of free messing (only basic menu) and a pocket allowance of Rs.250/- for each month (only those months will be counted in which classes are being conducted) is also released upfront for each Semester. The other eligibility conditions shall be: (a) The Free Messing scholarship shall be available to SC and ST Category students only. (b) The Gross Annual Income of parents/family for the completed financial year should not be more than Rs. 4.50 Lakh. (c) For Renewal the minimum SGPA & CGPA each >= 6.0 and backlog of courses is <=2. (d) The student who avails this scholarship shall not be eligible for accepting or applying for any other scholarship from Govt., Semi-Govt., Institutional, Private or any other sources. (e) There shall not be any upper cap on number of scholarships provid

metadata.title: Ugadm Programme Ugadmissions Institute Scholarship Final Policy 1.Pdf

text: scholarship. (d) For the existing students (Spring Semester & Autumn Semester – except new admission), the Cumulative Performance Index, CPI (SGPA & CGPA each >=6.0 and with total backlog courses <=2) shall be considered as the eligibility criteria to apply for award of scholarship. Every Semester the merit list will be prepared as per CGPA and eligibility criteria. (e) The student who avails this scholarship shall not be eligible for accepting or applying for any other scholarship from Govt., Semi-Govt., Institutional, Private or any other sources. Note: However, for any exceptional conditions when student want to avail scholarship from this Institute and private source, then student should take an approval for availing any assistance or scholarship from any other private organization. # Page Title: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu | Leading Engineering Institute for Future Innovators

- Online Education

IIT Jammu started B. Tech. programme in the year 2016 with an initial intake of 30 students each in Computer Science and Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Mechanical Engineering discipline. In the year 2017, B. Tech. in Civil Engineering discipline started with an initial intake of 30 students. In the year 2018, B. Tech. in Chemical Engineering discipline started with an initial intake of 30 students. Starting with the 2019-20 session, B. Tech. in Materials Engineering was added with an initial intake of 30 students. IIT Jammu has updated seat intake in 2021 re-emphasizing our approach to inter-di

metadata.title: Ugadm Ugadm

text:
## UG Programme B.Tech

The following programmes are offered by IIT Jammu for undergraduate studies.

1. B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering
2. B.Tech. in Civil Engineering
3. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering
4. B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering
5. B.Tech in Engineering Physics
6. B.Tech. in Materials and Metallurgical Engineering
7. B.Tech. in Mathematics and Computing
8. B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering
9. B.Tech. in Unified Engineering

**Note:**

1. **IIT Jammu** offers a dual degree undergraduate program in collaboration with **IIM Mumbai**, allowing students to earn both a B.Tech degree from IIT Jammu and an MBA in Operational and Supply Chain Management from IIM Mumbai within five years.
2. IIT Jammu UG programs include 20% seats (category-wise) for **IIT Jammu - IIM Jammu** dual degree program (four-year B.Tech of IIT Jammu and two-year MBA of IIM Jammu), transition to IIM Jammu MBA to be opted at the end of third year of the IIT Jammu B.Tech program. The transition to

metadata.title: Ugadm Ugadm

text:
## Admission to UG Programme

The admission to these 4-year B.Tech. programmes is done through Joint Entrance Examination - Advanced (JEE-Advanced) rank and administered by the Joint Admission Board (JAB) through centralized counseling conducted by JoSAA at the all-India level.

1. Why should you consider IIT Jammu as an institute of your choice?
2. IIT Jammu profile at JoSAA Portal | Opening and Closing Ranks in the previous years | JoSAA Schedule
3. Seat Matrix 2026 | Seat Matrix 2025 | Seat Matrix 2024 | Seat Matrix 2023 | Seat Matrix 2022 |

Seat Matrix 2021 | Seat Matrix 2020 | Seat Matrix 2019 | Seat Matrix 2018
4. ****There is NO option to change branch after admission to the B. Tech program through JoSAA since 2019.****
5. ****Prepaid SIMs from other states do not work in Jammu, J&K. Please bring a postpaid SIM, or procure one here in Jammu with Aadhaar. One working SIM helps connect with parents and offices, and for Aadhaar verification for DigiLocker or APAR ID registration.*

metadata.title: Ugadm Ugadm

text:
## Fee and Scholarship

1. Fee Structure
2. UG Scholarships

## Student Affairs (Hostel, Mess, Sports, Student Clubs)

1. General Guidelines for the freshers (First year UG students)
2. Transport Facilities
3. All undergraduate students at IIT Jammu shall be provided hostel accommodation when they report at the institute. They are requested to report to the caretaker office (Room no 132) for hostel accommodation. At the security check, please show a valid id proof and seat allotment letter.
4. Institute shall provide a bed, an almirah, a table, and a chair to each student accommodated in the hostel. There shall be stalls by vendors to purchase a mattress, bucket, mug, and some essential items for daily needs. Students/parents can make their own arrangements as well.
5. For any query related to Hostel, Mess, Sports, Student Clubs, please write to us at

swoffice@iitjammu.ac.in

Helpline Number - **0191-2570697**

**Visitors**
